body:value: Get data of Health Management Information System (HMIS) item-wise and month-wise comparison of Various Indicators of the State Uttar Pradesh. District level data of various parameters have been provided here. Main indicators are Ante Natal Care Services ANC, Deliveries, Number of Caesarean C-Section deliveries performed, Pregnancy outcome & weight of new-born, Complicated pregnancies, Post - Natal Care, Medical Termination of Pregnancy (MTP), RTI/STI Cases, Family Planning, Child Immunization, Number of Vitamin A doses, Number of cases of Childhood Diseases reported, Blindness Control Programme, Patient Services, Laboratory Testing, Stock Position, Details of deaths reported with probable causes. Ministry of Health and Family Welfare launched the National Health Mission (NHM) to ensure necessary architectural corrections in the basic health care delivery system. A continuous flow of good quality information on inputs, outputs and outcome indicators facilitates monitoring of the objectives of NHM. To monitor the performance and quality of the health services being provided under the NHM, the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, is putting in place several mechanisms that would strengthen the monitoring and evaluation systems, through performance statistics, surveys, community monitoring, quality assurance etc. HMIS is an information system launched during October, 2008 which has been specially designed to assist health departments, at all levels, in managing and planning health programmes. HMIS is defined as A tool which helps in gathering, aggregating, analyzing and then using the information generated for taking actions to improve performance of health systems.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
Uttar Pradesh
field_group_name:name: Health Management Information System
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
Department of Health and Family Welfare
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Family Welfare
Health
title: HMIS district level item wise and month wise comparison of various indicators of Uttar Pradesh

body:value: Get data on maximum & minimum performing public health facilities on selected data items across sub districts of Uttar Pradesh. Selected data items are deliveries conducted at facility, C -Section deliveries at facility, IPD attendance, OPD attendance (all), operation major (general and spinal anaesthesia) & operation minor (no or local anaesthesia). Data contains  total no. of facilities, number of facilities reporting nil performance, details of maximum and minimum performing facilities (name,  sub-district, value reported) etc.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
Uttar Pradesh
field_group_name:name: Health Management Information System
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
Department of Health and Family Welfare
field_sector:name: Health and Family welfare
Family Welfare
Health
title: Maximum & Minimum Performing Public Health Facilities on Selected Data Items across sub districts of Uttar Pradesh

body:value: District-wise Data on key performance Indicators of WDC - PMKSY2.0.The Department has been implementing a Centrally Sponsored Scheme (CSS) Integrated Watershed Management Programme (IWMP) since 2009-10, which was amalgamated as the Watershed Development Component of PMKSY (WDC-PMKSY) in 2015-16. The continuation of WDC-PMKSY has been allowed by the Government of India on 15.12.2021 as WDC-PMKSY 2.0 for the project period of 2021-2026.
